perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman dressed in a large circular lime costume walks confidently under a large concrete bridge before tripping and falling dramatically. (2) A second character wearing a giant coffee cup headpiece appears and reaches out to help her up. (3) The two characters hold hands as animated hearts float around them, then sit together on a park bench. (4) The scene transitions to a bright indoor kitchen where the woman (now in normal attire but holding a lemon) drinks from a coffee cup and smiles. (5) Close-up shots show the NESCAFE product box, the sachet, and the powder being poured into a glass with water and ice. (6) The woman appears in various costumes (lime and a green pea-like suit) while posing with the coffee product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music starts alongside a cheerful male voiceover in Mandarin. (2) A comical slide-whistle SFX plays as the girl falls, followed by a romantic, slower melody as the coffee character appears. (3) The music returns to a fast-paced, rhythmic tempo as the product features are described. (4) Sound effects of pouring water, ice clinking, and stirring are layered over the voiceover. (5) The woman's voice is heard briefly expressing satisfaction 'Ah' after drinking. (6) The video ends with a short, funny dialogue exchange and the upbeat music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '是咖啡哥哥!!!!' (Hook text - Excited tone). (2) '檸檬妹妹跌倒了' (Narrative text - Descriptive tone). (3) '妹妹我來了~~~' (Dialogue text - Playful tone). (4) '這就是我們愛的結晶' (Hook text - Melodramatic/Romantic tone). (5) '雀巢香檸美式咖啡' (Functional text - Informative). (6) '使用台灣在地檸檬原料', '完全零添加', '一週內立即鮮榨' (Functional text - Promotional product details). (7) '自由客製化調配咖啡', '水跟冰塊比例1:1' (Functional text - Tutorial instructions).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook Skit -> Product Introduction -> Preparation Tutorial -> Humorous Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 person in a coffee cup costume (likely male based on character role)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair, seen in various costumes (Lime, Pea) and casual white/black outfits.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor paved area under a large concrete bridge with graffiti-style pillars, followed by a modern, well-lit indoor kitchen with white cabinetry.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright natural outdoor light and clean, high-key studio-style kitchen lighting.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut transitions between skit music and instructional music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook Skit -> Information Gathering -> Tutorial -> Closing Humor
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote NESCAFE's Lemon Americano by using a humorous personification skit (the meeting of lime and coffee) to grab attention, followed by a detailed explanation of the product's quality (Taiwanese lemons, fresh extraction) and a step-by-step tutorial on how to prepare the perfect 1:1 ice-to-water ratio drink.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product box, usage of the product in a tutorial, and specific mentions of brand features like 'Taiwanese lemons'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic acting, personified food costumes, and rapid-fire instructional overlay text.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'Variety Show' aesthetic with colorful stickers and heart animations to appeal to a younger, social-media-savvy demographic.
